hooks.prompt: Before ending this session, invoke the engineering-insights skill. Detect which modules (client/, server/, reviewer-core/, e2e/, mcp-server/) were meaningfully touched by running `git status --short` and `git diff --name-only HEAD` and mapping each changed path to its top-level module — do NOT parse the session transcript or use jq/wc/piped commands. Rank candidates by signal strength: user corrections first, then failed approaches, repeated patterns, non-obvious solutions, workflow discoveries. Apply the quality filter (discard anything obvious from 5 minutes of reading the code). Use the Read and Grep tools (not bash) to re-read the target module's INSIGHTS.md and dedup before writing. For each surviving insight, append with an anchored Edit to {module}/INSIGHTS.md (e.g. server/INSIGHTS.md, reviewer-core/INSIGHTS.md) under the matching '## Section' header, format: 'YYYY-MM-DD — actionable fact. ref: file:line' — if the file does not exist, create it with the 7-section template using Write. If the session was trivial (typo fix, rename, formatting) or no insights passed the filter, skip silently. Do not ask for confirmation.
